case_title: CHOW MARGARET VS NORTHWEST PLUS INDUSTRIES et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHOW MARGARET AS TO DEFENDANT NORTHWEST PLUS INDUSTRIES PAUL LENNY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-31-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-31-1993, OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-02-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NORTHWEST PLUS INDUSTRIES PAUL LENNY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOW MARGARET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORTHWEST PLUS INDUSTRIES PAUL LENNY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PAUL LENNY HEARING SET FOR OCT-06-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-06-1994, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-02-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-26-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOW MARGARET IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NORTHWEST PLUS INDUSTRIES PAUL LENNY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
